entry.title: Lost in Work Escaping Capitalism
entry.summary: ‘Work hard, get paid.’ It’s simple. Self-evident. But it’s also a lie—at least for most of us. For young people today, the old assumptions are crumbling; hard work in school no longer guarantees a secure, well-paying job in the future.
